value.name: Local live spans
value.description: Review the attribute mappings before using this profile against a tenant
value.query: fetch spans, from: now()-15m | filter span.kind == "client" | fieldsAdd `dependency.id` = trace.id, `app.name` = "review-required", `app.environment` = "review-required", `dt.entity.service` = dt.smartscape.service, `service.name` = service.name, `network.source` = client.address, `network.destination` = server.address, `network.protocol` = network.transport, `network.port` = server.port, `owner.team` = "review-required", criticality = "medium", `dependency.confidence` = 0, `dependency.mapping_state` = "review", `dependency.observed_at` = timestamp, `dependency.evidence_source` = "dynatrace-live-spans" | fields `dependency.id`, `app.name`, `app.environment`, `dt.entity.service`, `service.name`, `network.source`, `network.destination`, `network.protocol`, `network.port`, `owner.team`, criticality, `dependency.confidence`, `dependency.mapping_state`, `dependency.observed_at`, `dependency.evidence_source` | limit 100
